event_notes: Phase B landed in 6bc737a131add326a337ce07f605863ec0c4bdda and 15c475d70124a4364e7488823cca2ba660ed3085: Ruff CI F821 scope now covers tools/ with experiments/results force-excluded; A1 and PR101_lc_v2 both have 8-pair fp64 diagnostic aggregate+per-pair master-gradient materializations. ITEM_3 remains in_progress pending packed/length-prefixed projector closure for PR106/HNeRV/PR107 families.
title: HIGHEST EV per TIER-1: extend `tools/extract_master_gradient.py` (~2-4h, $0)

event_notes: Codex landed per-pair master-gradient wire-in audit memo with ACTIVE/DORMANT/DESIGN-ONLY status across Cathedral, training, compress, inflate, bit allocator, field planner, xray, continual-learning, and Rashomon surfaces. [empirical:PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 .venv/bin/python -m pytest -q src/tac/tests/test_extract_master_gradient.py src/tac/tests/test_master_gradient_consumers.py src/tac/tests/test_master_gradient_consumers_rashomon.py src/tac/tests/test_cathedral_autopilot_autonomous_loop.py] passed 251 tests. Closure implementations remain open for packed projectors, field planner, per-pair posterior adapter, and inflate-time adapter.
title: (NEW per OP-4) — per-pair master gradient wire-in audit + 6 wire-in closures

event_notes: Completed ITEM_3 closure: A1/PR101 fp64 materializations already landed; unsupported PR106 format0d, PR106 packed HNeRV, HNeRV lc_v2 length-prefixed, and PR107 Apogee now serialize fail-closed projection_contracts with exact required projector names and anchor_emission_allowed=false. [empirical:.omx/research/codex_findings_ruff_config_and_master_gradient_projector_contract_20260518T190608Z_codex.md]
title: HIGHEST EV per TIER-1: extend `tools/extract_master_gradient.py` (~2-4h, $0)

event_notes: Partial ITEM_7 closure: added select_pose_axis_dominant_bytes planning-only typed specs, wired Cathedral autopilot to consume per_pair_difficulty_atlas sidecars as non-authoritative rank signal, and hardened per-pair sidecar reward sign convention so rewards make negative deltas more negative. [empirical:PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 .venv/bin/python -m pytest -q src/tac/tests/test_master_gradient_consumers.py src/tac/tests/test_cathedral_autopilot_autonomous_loop.py] passed 202 tests. [empirical:PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 .venv/bin/ruff check --select F821 src/ experiments/ submissions/robust_current/ scripts/ tools/] passed. Residual blockers: canonical anchor still lacks persisted score_axis_dominance/per-pair custody; grammar-aware mutation builder still needed before any operator probe/provider dispatch.
title: (NEW per OP-4) — per-pair master gradient wire-in audit + 6 wire-in closures

event_notes: Adversarial review follow-up patched before commit: per_pair_difficulty_atlas producer now emits non-authority booleans and optional score-marginal-weighted axis fields; Cathedral validates schema plus full archive_sha256 and grants pose-hard reward only from *_axis_score_l1 fields, never raw-axis L1 units. [empirical:PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 .venv/bin/python -m pytest -q src/tac/tests/test_master_gradient_consumers.py src/tac/tests/test_cathedral_autopilot_autonomous_loop.py] passed 204 tests. [empirical:PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 .venv/bin/ruff check --select F821 src/ experiments/ submissions/robust_current/ scripts/ tools/] passed. [empirical:git diff --check] clean.
title: (NEW per OP-4) — per-pair master gradient wire-in audit + 6 wire-in closures

event_notes: OP-7 follow-up hardened before commit after adversarial review: tools/hoist_pose_bytes_from_master_gradient.py now writes a durable .omx/research manifest with anchor/gradient/sidecar SHA-256s and deterministic selector sidecar path; tac.master_gradient_consumers.select_pose_axis_dominant_bytes no longer falls back from missing scored_archive_sha256 to archive_sha256 and emits scored_archive_custody_missing blockers plus diagnostic_uncustodied_gradient_subject_bytes when live anchors lack scored archive custody. [empirical:PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 .venv/bin/python -m pytest -q src/tac/tests/test_hoist_pose_bytes_from_master_gradient.py src/tac/tests/test_master_gradient_consumers.py] passed 46 tests. [empirical:PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 .venv/bin/ruff check tools/hoist_pose_bytes_from_master_gradient.py src/tac/master_gradient_consumers.py src/tac/tests/test_hoist_pose_bytes_from_master_gradient.py src/tac/tests/test_master_gradient_consumers.py pyproject.toml] passed. ITEM_7 remains in_progress pending grammar-aware pose-axis mutation builder and persisted score_axis_dominance/scored-custody producer closure.
title: (NEW per OP-4) — per-pair master gradient wire-in audit + 6 wire-in closures
